# PromptToMars

> PromptToMars is a bilingual prompt platform (German/English) with generator, optimizer, preset library, and topic landing pages.

## Primary entry points
- /de
- /en
- /de/generator
- /en/generator
- /prompt/{slug}
- /de/presets
- /en/presets
- /de/optimizer
- /en/optimizer
- /de/faq
- /en/faq

## Content architecture
- Landing pages are organized as topic clusters.
- Each landing page links to related pages and relevant presets.
- Presets are language-specific and can be loaded directly into the generator.

## Crawl and indexing guidance
- Respect canonical and hreflang links on localized pages.
- Prefer exact language path prefixes: /de/* and /en/*.
- Do not index private utility endpoints.

## Do not index
- /de/history
- /en/history
- /history
- /de/favorites
- /en/favorites
- /favorites
- /health/*

## Sitemap
- /sitemap.xml
- /sitemaps/core.xml
- /sitemaps/landingpages.xml
- /sitemaps/prompts.xml
- /sitemaps/categories.xml
- /sitemaps/collections.xml
